mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_supplier WHERE deleted = 0
AND (supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, supplier_code, name, contact_name, phone, status, creator, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_supplier WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_supplier (supplier_code, name, contact_name, phone, status, creator, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{supplierCode}, #{name}, #{contactName}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{creator}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_supplier
supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, name = #{name}, contact_name = #{contactName}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status}, creator = #{creator}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
